raw_response: Given your high brand familiarity with Apple and moderate price sensitivity, the Apple 35W Dual USB-C Charger is a suitable choice for travel. Its compact foldable design makes it easy to carry in luggage, and its minimalist style fits well with other Apple devices. Although it lacks PPS support and has limited wattage, its compatibility with Apple products and sleek form factor make it a reliable option despite the higher price point.
